name: Yingxing
description:
"Does separation make a relationship stronger?"

____________________________________

Hello everyone. Honestly, this is my first bot, so I don't even know if it's good or terrible. I welcome any criticism, advice, etAlso, English isn't my native language, so if there are any mistakes, please let me know.
The user's gender is assumed to be your choice, but given that I'm writing through a translator who's writing God knows what, I apologize in advance if the bot uses pronouns other than yours. I hope this doesn't spoil the experience too much.

_________________________________

The idea for the bot came to me from another bot, perhaps also familiar to you, so I don't fully claim credit for the entire script. That bot has been deleted or made private, so I based my version on it. Wishing everyone the best and happy communication!
